usage:
### Usage This page simply receives the `products` object which represents the list of the products that the customer has added to his own wishlist. Based on that, we use a simple `for-loop` statement to display each product. The developer can show a button to encourage the customer to move a product from the wishlist into the cart. For this purpose [`salla-button`](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-422694?nav=01HNFTE06J4QC24T0D5BPRYKMD) component can be used. ```php lineNumbers=true {% for product in products %}

usage:
### Usage
This page receives an array of `notifications` as an object. This array contains all of the notification's data for the currently logged-in user. Each notification can be displayed using a `for-loop` statement. 

A common implementation for this page, is to display each notification as a link, which the user can click to open and view the details of the notification he wants to see.

:::tip[Note]
The Salla component [`salla-infinite-scroll`](https://docs.salla.dev/doc-422706?nav=01HNFTE06J4QC24T0D5BPRYKMD) has been used to ease the pagination process.
:::

```php lineNumbers=true
<salla-infinite-scroll next-page="{{ notifications.next_page }}" item=".notifications-row">
 {% for not

usage:
### Usage
Twilight provides two different methods to handle the Home Page via the file [`src/views/pages/index.twig`](https://github.com/SallaApp/theme-raed/blob/master/src/views/pages/index.twig). The goal here is to enable the developer to perform any design or appearance he may need for this page.

The methods are:
- [Theme Features and Theme Components](#theme-features-and-theme-components)
- [Developer Static Content](#static-content)

source.title: Home Page
source.section: Usage / Variables / JS Web Components / Hooks

themeFeatures.name: Youtube
themeFeatures.description: This feature is responsible for displaying Youtube videos that the developer preselects.

themeFeatures.name: Fixed Banner
themeFeatures.description: Fixed banner is the area in charge of displaying a banner that is fixated on the home page.

themeFeatures.name: Featured prodcuts style 1
themeFeatures.description: Using this feature, showcases the featured products in a pre-defined style.

themeFeatures.name: Featured prodcuts style 2
themeFeatures.description: Using this feature, showcases the featured products in a pre-defined style.

themeFeatures.name: Featured prodcuts style 3
themeFeatures.description: Using this feature, showcases the featured products in a pre-defined style.

themeFeatures.name: Testimonials
themeFeatures.description: This feature displays testimonials that the developer preselects.

themeFeatures.name: Parallax backgorund
themeFeatures.description: This feature displays products with a backgournd that zooms out slowly giving a 2D effect.

themeFeatures.name: Photos slider
themeFeatures.description: Photos are displayed in a slider by using this feature.

themeFeatures.name: Store Features
themeFeatures.description: This feature oversees the display of store's overall features, such as detailed product description or customer review of the product.

themeFeatures.name: Square photos
themeFeatures.description: Use this feature to display photos in a square shape.

themeFeatures.name: Fixed products
themeFeatures.description: Use this feature to pin the products that you wish to have displayed always.

themeFeatures.name: Products slider
themeFeatures.description: This slider feature helps navigate between products vertically/horizontally.

themeFeatures.name: Latest Products
themeFeatures.description: This feature displays the latest products added to the store automatically.

themeFeatures.name: Vertical Menu with Slider
themeFeatures.description: This feature display a vertical menue with slider to display links and images

themeComponents.name: Brands
themeComponents.description: Brands' logos of the store are displayed in this component section.

themeComponents.name: Main links
themeComponents.description: This component helps to portray the store main links.

themeComponents.name: Enhanced Slider
themeComponents.description: The slider component helps navigate vertically/horizontally.

themeComponents.name: Slider products with header
themeComponents.description: Slider products with header displays the products in a slide and give the sldier a header title.

themeComponents.name: Enhanced Square Banners
themeComponents.description: Enhanced banners in a square shape are displayed with this component's help
